name: Java Game Design (Chromebook Edition)
postCreateCommand: sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y libxrender1 libxtst6 libxi6 fluxbox novnc x11vnc && (Xvfb :1 -screen 0 1024x768x24 & sleep 2 && DISPLAY=:1 fluxbox & x11vnc -display :1 -nopw -forever -shared & /usr/share/novnc/utils/launch.sh --vnc localhost:5900 --listen 6080)
